figures.caption: Figure 4: User-generated prompts from preliminary study. Symbols indicate the corresponding prop template specified in subsection 4.1: * = ‘[Noun]’, † = ‘[Adjective] [Noun]’, ‡ = ‘[Noun] with [Description]’ and § = ‘[Noun] [Performing Action]’.
Figure 6: Prompts, original physical objects, PropChromeleon generations, and baseline generations used for Task 1 in our user study.

Figure 8: Questionnaire results for individual questions, and haptic factors. We found a significant difference for all questions and factors except E5: “The haptic feedback reflects varying inputs and events”, E1: “The haptic feedback all felt the same”, and PA4: “Expressivity”.
Figure 9: Examples of user-generated prompts and their corresponding generated results from Task 2.

Figure 2: The Prop-Chromeleon processing pipeline combines depth and object tracking, and integrates the user’s prompt by combining Stable Diffusion and ControlNet to generate a 3D object that is overlaid and aligned with the physical prop.
